summary: Restore role-limited type scoring for main-general-only clauses when tactic text also contains non-limiting references such as target unit main general.
rootCause: The main-general role detector in hado_type_score.js suppressed main-role detection whenever the same matchedText also contained broad strings such as 主将と or 主将の戦法. Real tactic text can contain both この武将が主将の場合 and 対象部隊の主将と..., so main-only clauses became role-neutral and affected vice/support/attendant scoring.
externalizationDecision: No HTML/CSS change. The fix is in external type scoring JavaScript and regression tests.
minimumUserAcceptance: Open type candidates after Update08.17, compare main/vice/support role tabs for a candidate with main-only clauses, and confirm main-only benefits no longer score in non-main tabs.
